dc_description: A person stands on a raised sidewalk beside a large painted mural on a building wall. The mural includes oversized blue feather- or leaf-like shapes and an orange patterned section. The person is wearing dark clothing, gloves, a backpack, cropped pants, socks, and sandals; their face is blurred. To the right, a black car is parked close to the curb, with two bicycles in front of it. The background shows stone buildings with arched windows, shutters, balconies, a satellite dish, street signs, and a lamppost under bright daylight.
novel_visual_observations: The mural is signed near the bottom with text resembling “S.M.#1” and “NICK LISA.” A white bicycle has a large cylindrical item strapped along its frame near the front wheel.
rich_context: Osteria Pensa per Te, 13, Viale Regina Elena, Formello, Roma Capitale, Lazio, Italia
